DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD IN GOOD FAITH LIABILITY BASED ON THIS DEFENDANT'S POST ACQUISITION CONDUCT, FACTS JUSTIFYING DELAYED RUNNING OF THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION, ACTIONABLE MISREPRESENTATION BY THIS DEFENDANT WITH THE REQUIRED SPECIFICITY, TENDER, AND THE ELEMENTS OF THE VARIOUS OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301)

PLAINTIFFS DO NOT HAVE VIABLE CLAIMS AGAINST THE DEMURRING DEFENDANTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077
